description_long: This hardware store is a rectangular, two-story commercial building with a flat roof and a small rooftop structure, likely for utilities or storage. The facade is minimalist, painted white, and features three large, dark-framed windows and a single entrance door on the ground floor, all set above a striped sidewalk or pavement. The windows are evenly spaced, providing natural light to the interior, while the upper floor has smaller, square windows. The building sits on a base with alternating black and white stripes, suggesting a modern urban context, possibly adjacent to a crosswalk or parking area. The overall design is functional and unadorned, with no visible signage or decorative elements.
description: A modern, white, rectangular hardware store with large front windows and a flat roof, set on a striped pavement. The facade is minimalist and functional, with a small rooftop structure.
description_view_0: The front view shows three large windows, a single entrance door, and a striped pavement, highlighting the main access and display area.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing the building's rectangular shape and the striped pavement extending alongside.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a featureless white wall and the flat roof, with the rooftop structure visible on the left side.
description_view_3: The right side view shows a single small window on the upper floor and the continuation of the striped pavement, with the rooftop structure visible at the back.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features three large windows and a single entrance door on the ground floor, all set above a striped pavement. The arrangement is symmetrical and minimalist, with no visible display areas or decorative elements.
